title: Healthcare Content Writer
description: Research and write parent-friendly, evidence-based educational articles, guides, and materials focusing on premature baby care and neonatal health.
requirements: Degree in Journalism, Communications, Public Health, or a related field
Two or more years of experience writing health or medical educational content
Ability to translate complex clinical terms into warm, supportive, simple language
Familiarity with medical disclaimers and responsible content guidelines

title: Digital Health Research Assistant
description: Gather, review, and organize clinical guidelines from established neonatal pediatric organizations to support the editorial team with accurate data.
requirements: Background in Nursing, Life Sciences, Public Health, or Neonatal Health advocacy
Strong research skills and ability to analyze peer-reviewed medical publications
Detail-oriented with a high commitment to medical accuracy and verification
Excellent written communication and reference organization skills

title: Parent Support Coordinator
description: Organize virtual parent educational webinars, manage community support resources, and coordinate parent story submissions.
requirements: Experience in counseling, parent support groups, or community management
Warm, empathetic, and professional communication style
Ability to organize and moderate online webinars and Q&A sessions safely
Understanding of parent support frameworks and boundaries of non-clinical guidance

title: SEO Content Executive
description: Optimize our digital health articles to rank on search engines for premature baby care topics in India, ensuring educational content reaches families.
requirements: Experience in SEO strategies specifically for health information domains
Knowledge of search engine guidelines for medical and health education platforms
Familiarity with keyword optimization, semantic structure, and metadata writing
Proven track record of improving organic visibility for informational keywords

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build and maintain the responsive educational web platform, optimizing for performance, accessibility, and high static rendering speeds.
requirements: Strong experience with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and static exports
Familiarity with web performance, semantic HTML, and core web vitals
Experience implementing web animations (Framer Motion, Canvas API) smoothly
Knowledge of accessible web design practices (WCAG guidelines)

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design warm, comforting, and intuitive user interfaces that make seeking healthcare information stress-free for anxious parents.
requirements: Portfolio demonstrating premium, clean, accessible digital product designs
Understanding of design systems, warm color palettes, and emotional UI principles
Experience designing complex data-visualization tools like growth trackers
Collaboration skills to work with developers on styling and animations
